generated_oml:
instance MotorShaftPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time-series position data streamed via MQTT protocol from motor shaft encoder"
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time-series position data streamed via MQTT protocol from gearbox encoder"
]

instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Six-axis serial robot from MABI Robotic AG"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor on the first axis with input current generating torque"
]

instance CycloidalGearMechanism : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear mechanism coupled to the motor for torque transmission"
]

instance MotorShaftEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor shaft position encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorShaftPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder positioned behind the gearbox for measuring output angle",
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SystemRequirementsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight related to system requirements"
]

instance ArchitectureDesignInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight related to architecture design"
]

instance SystemAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight related to system analysis"
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Multi-physics-aware joint friction identification for motion accuracy enhancement"
]

instance OperationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational insights via visualization dashboard"
]

instance PrecisionImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adaptive control parameter adjustment for precision improvement",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemRequirementsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for system requirements management",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemRequirementsInsight
]

instance ArchitectureDesignService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for architecture design",
    DTDFVocab:provides ArchitectureDesignInsight
]

instance SystemAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for system analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemAnalysisInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction to enhance motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization via dashboard for operational insights",
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalInsight
]

instance ControlParameterOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of robot control parameters to improve precision",
    DTDFVocab:provides PrecisionImprovementAction
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling across multiple abstraction levels",
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemRequirementsService
]

instance AADLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL for component and connector structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables ArchitectureDesignService
]

instance ACMEModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME for architecture description language modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables ArchitectureDesignService
]

instance MontiArcBehaviorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral simulation",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical modeling and control parameter optimization",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ControlParameterOptimizationService
]

instance RFLPMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics) methodology for system complexity management",
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemAnalysisService
]

instance OOSEMMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for system complexity management",
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemAnalysisService
]

instance SPESMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for system complexity management",
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemAnalysisService
]

instance SMArDTMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for system complexity management",
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemAnalysisService
]

instance FrictionModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Friction modeling using Simulink and MontiArc for multi-physics analysis",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MotionControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Motion control parameter optimization using Simulink and MontiArc",
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterOptimizationService
]

instance CPPProgrammingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for real-time visualization and data processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance JavaProgrammingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java for real-time visualization and data processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance MotorShaftPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor shaft encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingEnabler, MotionControlEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from gearbox encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingEnabler, MotionControlEnabler
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML for multi-level abstraction (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer)",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance AADLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AADL for architecture description and component connector modeling",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADLModelingEnabler
]

instance ACMEModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACME for architecture description and component connector modeling",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACMEModelingEnabler
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral simulation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcBehaviorEnabler
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical modeling",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMAX100Robot
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The system operates as a digital shadow with a strictly one-way data flow from physical to virtual; it functions as a passive entity that neither operates autonomously nor transmits control commands or feedback to the physical system, as defined by Kritzinger et al. [32]."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system is orchestrated via the Digital Shadow Reference Model, which includes components such as Purpose, DataTrace, Source, Asset, Processing, and Model as defined in the UML class diagram (Fig. 1). This structure facilitates the aggregation and abstraction of contextual data traces for specific manufacturing purposes, integrating physical assets and processing steps."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses the development phase, where Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) employs SysML to model requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layers, and the operational phase where active components process real-time data traces for continuous model refinement, such as friction model identification, to enhance system accuracy during physical asset operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is ensured through precise dynamics modeling to improve robot motion accuracy, validated by comparing simulated data deviations against measured physical data. This validation process identifies discrepancies and refines model parameters to enhance accuracy and reliability of the digital twin."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical network infrastructure employs MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from physical components to the digital shadow, with no additional details on topology, bandwidth, latency, or security protocols specified."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems uses MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data, Asset Administration Shells (AAS) as an interoperability standard, and direct connection to Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controllers for machine control and data acquisition."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards including SysML [17] for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE), ACME [23], AADL [24], and MontiArc [25], [26] as Architecture Description Languages (ADLs) for component & connector perspectives, along with methodologies like RFLP [18], [19], OOSEM [20], SPES [21], and SMArDT [22] for managing system complexity across abstraction levels. Behavior modeling is supported via SysML state machines and MontiArc Automaton, integrated with tools such as MathWorks Simulink [28], simulation tools [29], [30], and programming languages like C++ and Java to address heterogeneous stakeholder perspectives [31]."
]
